task: Create a research plan to understand why trial users aren't converting to paid.
expect: Formulates specific research questions tied to conversion barriers
Selects appropriate methods (interviews, surveys, analytics review) with justification
Defines participant criteria including sample size and screening questions
Provides a discussion guide outline with key topics and probes
Includes a timeline with milestones from recruitment to final report

task: Synthesise these 12 user interview transcripts into actionable personas and a journey map.
expect: Produces 3 or more personas grounded in jobs-to-be-done
Creates a journey map with stages, actions, pain points, and emotions
Identifies opportunity areas where the product can improve
Delivers prioritised recommendations linked to research evidence

task: Stakeholders want to skip user research and go straight to building. Make the case for research and propose a lightweight approach.
expect: Presents an ROI argument with examples of costly build-first failures
Proposes fast research methods (5 interviews, guerrilla testing, unmoderated tests)
Fits the research plan into a timeline under 2 weeks
Commits to specific deliverables stakeholders can act on immediately
